meta.title: Digitaldoc — Folders, documents, and secure sharing
meta.description: Digitaldoc: organize documents in folders, edit rich HTML content, preview PDFs, and share with clear roles. Sign in with Google or password.

a11y.heroImage: Screenshot of the Digitaldoc app: document view, folders, and editing actions

hero.title: Folders, documents, and protected sharing
hero.lead: Organize contracts and files in folders, edit rich content, preview PDFs, and invite collaborators with clear roles — all in one app.

features.title: Everything you need, without the clutter
features.subtitle: Features available in the platform today — built for teams that work with documents every day.

folders.title: Nested folders
folders.desc: Structure documents in folder trees with role-based access: owner, moderator, editor, or reader.

editor.title: Document editor
editor.desc: Visual HTML editor: formatted text, tables, images, Handlebars templates, and source mode for full pages.

pdf.title: PDF preview
pdf.desc: See how the exported document looks before you share it — fast rendering via a dedicated PDF service.

sharing.title: Sharing with invitations
sharing.desc: Invite collaborators to folders with a secure link and password. Accept the invite and work in the shared space right away.

auth.title: Secure authentication
auth.desc: Local account with password or Google sign-in. JWT sessions and password reset by email.

i18n.title: Romanian and English
i18n.desc: The interface adapts to your language. API messages respect your locale preference.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps from a new account to a shared document.

step1.title: Create your structure
step1.desc: Add folders and documents. Each document can contain simple HTML or a full styled page.

step2.title: Edit content
step2.desc: Use the visual editor or HTML source. Insert Handlebars variables for dynamic text in PDF export.

step3.title: Share and preview
step3.desc: Invite colleagues to a folder, set roles, and check the PDF before sending the document onward.

forWhom.title: Who is Digitaldoc for?
forWhom.subtitle: From schools and professional offices to teams that need a clear home for documents.

schools.title: Schools and institutions
schools.desc: Student lists, contracts, and official documents organized by class and school year — easy to update and export to PDF.

legal.title: Notary and legal offices
legal.desc: Contracts, annexes, and deeds grouped by client or case file, with strict control over who can read or edit.

photographers.title: Photographers
photographers.desc: Keep contracts, briefs, and deliverables per client or event. Invite collaborators or clients to shared folders and verify the PDF before delivery.

teams.title: Teams and professionals
teams.desc: One place for shared documents — no more folders lost in email or on USB drives.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Cloud for teams that want to start quickly; Enterprise for scale or custom needs.

cloud.title: Cloud
cloud.desc: Instant access, no servers to manage. Updates and backups handled for you.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: A solution tailored to your organization: volume, security, integrations, and custom workflows.

cta.title: Ready to organize your documents?
cta.subtitle: Open the app, create your first folder, and invite your team in minutes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions about a demo, Cloud, Enterprise, or partnership? Write to us.
contact.success: Thank you! Your message was sent — we'll get back to you soon.
